name: Guizang Social Card
description_en: Generate Xiaohongshu carousels, WeChat cover pairs (21:9 + 1:1), and Live Photo cards from articles, screenshots, or videos using two visual systems—editorial magazine and Swiss International.
description_zh: 基于「电子杂志风」与「瑞士国际主义」两套视觉系统，从文章、截图或视频生成小红书图文、公众号 21:9 + 1:1 封面对，以及 Live Photo 动态卡。
long_en: An agent skill that turns text, screenshots, product notes, or short videos into share-ready social cards. It provides two visual systems (editorial magazine × Swiss grid), three canvas sizes (Xiaohongshu 3:4, WeChat 21:9, 1:1), 28 layout skeletons, ten theme presets, and Live Photo support. Output is rendered from a single-file HTML template to PNG via Playwright.
long_zh: 一个 agent 设计技能，将文本、截图、产品笔记或短视频转换为可直接发布的社交媒体卡片。提供两套视觉系统（电子杂志风 × 瑞士网格）、三种画板尺寸（小红书 3:4、公众号 21:9 与 1:1）、28 个版式骨架、10 套主题预设，并支持 Live Photo 动态卡。通过单文件 HTML 模板与 Playwright 渲染输出 PNG。
sec_note_en: Produces local image/HTML assets and may fetch images from the web; review outputs and image sources before publishing. Licensed AGPL-3.0 (copyleft)—review the license terms before redistribution.
sec_note_zh: 产出本地图片/HTML 物料，并可能从网络获取图片；发布前请审阅输出内容与图片来源。采用 AGPL-3.0(copyleft)许可——再分发前请确认许可条款。
